india_trends.title: E-commerce, 3PL drive surge in warehouse leasing

india_trends.title: Bank credit grows 16% in FY26, faster than deposits rise
india_trends.summary: Bank credit saw a significant 16% rise, reaching ₹219 lakh crore. Deposits grew 13.4% to ₹267.8 lakh crore by March 31, 2026. Investments also increased by 4.7%. india_trends.title: Iran war puts US companies in wait-and-see mode, Fed Beige Book says

india_trends.title: Delhi's EV charging infra registers 'record' expansion; total charging points over 10,000
india_trends.summary: Delhi’s EV charging network has crossed 10,000 points after record expansion in the past year, with over 3,000 added recently. india_trends.title: India trade delegation to visit US for BTA talks, first in-person meeting since October
india_trends.summary: An Indian trade team led by Darpan Jain will visit the US from April 20–22 for talks on a bilateral trade agreement, the first in-person meeting since October. india_trends.summary: Copper edged lower as traders eyed the prospect of peace negotiations between the US and Iran.

india_trends.title: Satin Creditcare’s SGAL secures SEBI nod for Rs 200 crore women-focused AIF
india_trends.summary: Satin Growth Alternatives has secured SEBI approval to launch a ₹200 crore AIF focused on women-led businesses, aiming to drive inclusive growth, sustainability, and impactful investments across emerging sectors in India.

india_trends.title: Mark Mobius, pioneer of emerging markets investing, dies at 89
india_trends.summary: Mark Mobius, a pioneer of emerging markets investing, has died at 89. Known for decades at Franklin Templeton Investments, he championed opportunities across developing economies, delivering strong returns and shaping global investment strategies worldwide.
